pages.raw_text:
The Spokane Typographical
union yesterday held the regular
election of officers, selecting the
following: President. w. d. Whea-
ton; vice president, w. H. Hooker;
secretary-treasurer. Sam Kennedy;
sergeant at arms. Plea Shafer: ex-
ecutive committee, B. F. Coffman,
C. w. Garrison, A. w. Nolen, W..
e. Camp; delegates to the allied
trades council, j r. Morford, N. j..
Laumer. c. w. Garrison. w. D..
Wheaton and N. J. Laumer were
elected delegates to the Central
Labor union and two others will be
appointed by the president


A dispute with the Independent
Printing Co. came before the
union for further action and nego-
tiation. Members of the union
were prohibited from working in
that Office until the affair Is settled.
